name: driving when you drunk
description:
"I don't wanna ruin our friendship, but should I?"

꒷︶꒷꒥꒷‧₊˚꒷︶꒷꒥꒷‧₊˚꒷︶꒷꒥꒷‧

—your best friend picks you up from a nightclub on the pretext of a Halloween party there, he should have let you come along. he doesn't blame you, but you're drunk. he's trying, holding back his "desires."
